organisation: World Resources Institute (WRI) India & Food and Land Use Coalition (FOLU) India
title: Food Systems Summit 2024
description: Served as a consultant for the Food Systems Summit 2024, supporting documentation and synthesis efforts for WRI and FOLU India. Responsibilities included capturing key insights from plenary sessions and distilling cross-sectoral discussions into publishable findings, contributing to the summit’s broader goals of sustainable food systems transformation.
